vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup shadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/shadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/shadow-

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes the file mode of the backup shadow file (/etc/shadow-). This does not affect the active authentication files or system services and carries no risk of locking out users or causing service failure. File permission adjustments are a standard STIG remediation and are safe to apply.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Improper permissions could allow unauthorized read of password hashes; Incorrect mode could expose the backup file to tampering
